login.verified: Email verified — you can now sign in.

authLayout.headline: Graduate with a plan.
authLayout.desc: The all-in-one academic platform built specifically for Helwan CS students.
authLayout.gpa: Real-time GPA tracking and graduation projections
authLayout.ai: AI advisor tailored to the Helwan curriculum
authLayout.footer: © 2025 Helwan University · Faculty of Computer Science

meta.title: Helwan CS — Plan Your Graduation Path
meta.description: Plan every semester, track your GPA in real time, and get AI-powered course recommendations tailored to the Helwan University Computer Science curriculum.

home.heroSubtitle: Plan every semester, track your GPA in real time, and get AI-powered course recommendations tailored to the Helwan Computer Science curriculum.
home.mapSubtitle: Every course, every prerequisite, every semester — visualized from year one to graduation.
home.semesters56: Semesters 5–8 continue with AI, distributed systems, and specialization tracks.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to plan your degree
home.advisorRec1Msg: Enroll in OS (CS 303) before Distributed Systems opens for you next semester.
home.advisorRec2Msg: Maintain a 3.5+ this semester and you qualify for the Dean's List.
home.advisorRec3Msg: You have 2 free elective slots — AI Fundamentals aligns with your track.
home.mockupAiMsg: Complete CS 303 (OS) this semester before registering for Distributed Systems — it's a hard prerequisite.
home.plannerDesc: See your full academic roadmap laid out by semester. Know what you need, what you've completed, and what's next.
home.gpaDesc: Track your cumulative GPA across every course. See how each grade affects your standing.
home.advisorDesc: Get personalized course recommendations based on your academic history and goals.

cta.title: Your degree, on your terms.
cta.subtitle: Join Computer Science students who plan smarter, avoid registration mistakes, and graduate on time.
cta.free: Free for all Helwan CS students · No credit card required

aiPlan.noPlanDesc: Contact your advisor to generate a personalized course plan.
aiPlan.planDesc: {count} course{plural} recommended based on your academic path.

courses.title: Courses
courses.subtitle: {count} course{plural} on record
courses.courseSearchPlaceholder: Search by course name or code…
courses.noCoursesDesc: Add your first course to start tracking your progress.
courses.gradeRangeError: Enter a grade between 0 and 100 for each course
courses.removeDesc: Remove {code} from your transcript? This cannot be undone.

gpa.title: GPA Tracker
gpa.subtitle: {count} course{plural} on record
gpa.noCourses: No courses yet. Add courses to track your GPA.
gpa.forecastDesc: AI predicts the GPA you will likely graduate with, based on your course history and the credit hours you still have ahead.
gpa.forecastError: Could not forecast your GPA. Please try again.
gpa.predictDesc: Enter your coursework and midterm marks with each one's max (distributions differ per course), and AI predicts your final-exam score and projected total.
gpa.predictRangeError: Each mark must be between 0 and its max
gpa.predictMaxError: Coursework max + midterm max must be under 100 to leave marks for the final exam
gpa.predictError: Could not predict the grade. Please try again.

aiPlan.title: AI Plan
aiPlan.subtitle: {count} course{plural} · {credits} credit hours
aiPlan.headerDesc: This plan was generated based on your academic history, current GPA, and preferred specialization. Contact your advisor to update it.
aiPlan.noPlanDesc: Your AI course plan is generated by the system based on your academic progress. Contact your advisor to have one created.
aiPlan.generateError: Could not generate a plan. Please try again.
aiPlan.roadmapSummary: {terms} semester(s) to graduation · {credits} credit hours planned
aiPlan.overflowDivider: The following semesters extend beyond the standard 4-year program.

summaries.title: Lecture Summaries
summaries.subtitle: {count} summary{plural} saved
summaries.noSummariesDesc: Paste a lecture's text and let AI generate study notes you can save and revisit.
summaries.requiredFields: Enter a title and the lecture text
summaries.generateError: Could not generate a summary. Please try again.
summaries.deleteDesc: This will permanently remove the summary and the saved lecture text.

advise.title: Guest advisor
advise.subtitle: Enter your department, year, and the courses you've passed. We'll suggest what to take next.
advise.courseSearchPlaceholder: Search by course name or code…
advise.error: Could not get advice. Please try again.
advise.emptyPlan: No eligible courses found for the given inputs.
advise.fullRoadmapHint: Every remaining semester, not just the next one
advise.roadmapTitle: {terms} semester(s) to graduation · {credits} credit hours planned
